positive: Minimalist botanical illustration of a vibrant, glowing Moonflower and delicate ferns, arranged in a cohesive, symmetrical bouquet. The style should be a modern, stylized watercolor silhouette print with strong, saturated jewel-toned colors (deep sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasting against a clean, off-white background. Focus on clean lines, detailed vein work on leaves, and the elegant, spiraling structure of the Moonflower. Composition must be centered and framed for apparel printing. Studio lighting, high contrast, vector art quality, perfect symmetry, highly detailed, suitable for screen printing.
negative: text, letters, watermark, logo, signature, blurry, noisy, messy, dirty, grayscale, low detail, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy
